author: ladidan
content: How are EIP-8025 optional proofs expected to work? (thread)

author: jsign
content:
New [tests-zkevm@v0.6.0](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-zkevm%40v0.6.0):
- Based on [tests-glamsterdam-devnet@v7.2.0](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-glamsterdam-devnet%40v7.2.0) (i.e. glamsterdam-devnet-7)
- Simplifies the stateless chain configuration and structures `SCHEMA_ID` by protocol fork and schema revision. ([PR](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/3138))
